text: Standing in this hallway, peering through glass into a stark, ordered room, I am struck by a sense of anticipation mixed with isolation. The clean lines and emptiness invite reflection. Upon entering the vibrant R+D exhibit, curiosity awakens within me. The bold colors and exploratory energy of the space fuel my desire to understand how we innovate and how ideas take shape. I feel as though I am transitioning from the calm of preparation into the vibrant pulse of inquiry. It is invigorating, disorienting, and deeply thought-provoking, as if I am being invited to question the boundaries between what is known and what could be discovered.
